introSection: Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Lake Compounce in Bristol, Connecticut, USA. The ride opened in 1997, along with Zoomerang. It has an oval track layout.
fullText:
Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Lake Compounce in Bristol, Connecticut, USA. The ride opened in 1997, along with Zoomerang. It has an oval track layout.



Black/white track and white supports.
